case_title: WINNIE YAN VS. XING CHAN HU

docket_entries.description: (SC-221) RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAN, WINNIE AS TO DEFENDANT HU, XING CHAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---JULIE CHUNG. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---FION HU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAN, WINNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HU, XING CHAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,285.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HU, XING CHAN
ORDER APPROVING REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS ($500 ON THE FIRST DAY OF THE MONTH BEGINNING 3/1/15 UNTIL 12/1/5. FINAL PAYMENT $785 PLUS INTEREST.) TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS $5285 PLUS INTEREST OF $460
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY YAN, WINNIE AS TO DEFENDANT HU, XING CHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $35.00 SERVED DEC-08-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HU, XING CHAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2015 - JUDGMENT.
